query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS capital_stack_templates (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  template_id VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL UNIQUE,
  name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  description TEXT,
  thesis_alignment VARCHAR(128),
  total_layers INT DEFAULT 0,
  target_ltv DECIMAL(5,2),
  target_equity_pct DECIMAL(5,2),
  target_seller_note_pct DECIMAL(5,2),
  is_principal_default TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  is_active TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 1,
  disclaimer TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS capital_stacks (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  deal_id VARCHAR(64),
  template_id VARCHAR(64),
  user_id INT,
  name VARCHAR(255),
  purchase_price BIGINT,
  total_capital BIGINT,
  status ENUM('draft','modeled','approved','closed') DEFAULT 'draft',
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL,
  updated_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS capital_stack_layers (
  id INT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY,
  stack_id INT NOT NULL,
  layer_order INT NOT NULL,
  layer_type ENUM('senior_debt','sba_7a','sba_504','seller_note','equity','mezzanine','grant','reap','earnout','rollover_equity','other') NOT NULL,
  label VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL,
  amount BIGINT NOT NULL,
  pct_of_total DECIMAL(5,2),
  interest_rate DECIMAL(5,2),
  term_months INT,
  lender VARCHAR(255),
  notes TEXT,
  created_at BIGINT NOT NULL
);
